headline: Disney Job Cuts Test Josh D’Amaro’s Cost Focus And Growth Plans
summary: Disney (NYSE:DIS) plans to cut about 1,000 jobs, largely in its marketing division, under new CEO Josh D’Amaro. The workforce reduction is part of "Project Imagine," aimed at reorganizing marketing across film, TV, and streaming. This is the first major operational change announced since D’Amaro took over as CEO. For you as an investor, this move touches the core of how Disney allocates resources across its film studios, TV networks, and streaming platforms. Marketing is central to how the...
